name: Dracha
rules_text: H:2 A:1 HP:9 L:2 Cast on friendly town or colony. Creates Dracha, a Gargoyle Hero swordsman. Cannot be targeted by individual spells. When he dies, he creates a friendly colony if his square is empty, and his group withdraws at the start of the next round, ending combat. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)
